title: Amtech E0675 25mm (1") x 250mm (10") SDS Chisel
features: DURABLE: This SDS chisel is made from drop forged, hardened and tempered steel for durability
VERSATILE: 25mm (1") x 250mm (10") in size, it fits all standard SDS machines
SIZE CAPACITY: 25 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Chisel See more
